title: Nikki Haley endorses Donald Trump
shortDescription: Watch the full remarks from Nikki Haley, former U.N. ambassador and presidential candidate, at the 2024 Republican National Convention in Milwaukee.

title: Greeted by boos, former rival Nikki Haley endorses Donald Trump at RNC
shortDescription: Nikki Haley, the former ambassador and South Carolina governor who tried to defeat Donald Trump, thanked him for including her in the Republican convention.

title: VP Harris and Trump running mate JD Vance speak by phone
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris and Sen. J.D. Vance, Trump’s running mate, spoke Tuesday, though possible debate between the two remains up in the air.

title: Report says Biden to push major Supreme Court reform
shortDescription: The move marks a seismic shift for Biden, who has resisted a big overhaul of the Supreme Court. He is seeking to energize the left flank of his party.
